professionals.name: Lakshmi Devi
professionals.about: Expert in bridal blouse designs and maggam embroidery. 15 years of experience serving 5000+ happy customers. Specializes in silk saree handling and custom fitting.

reviews.text: Absolutely stunning work on my wedding blouse! The maggam embroidery was even better than I imagined. Perfect fit on the first try.
Lakshmi ji understood exactly what I wanted for my silk saree fall. Very professional and delivered on time.
Great work on alterations. Quick turnaround and reasonable pricing. Will definitely book again.

professionals.name: Ramesh Kumar
professionals.about: Specialist in zari work and traditional embroidery patterns. Known for precision cutting and perfect finishing. Works with all fabric types.

reviews.text: The zari work on my blouse was exquisite. Ramesh ji has magic hands!

bookings.notes: Boat neck, elbow sleeves, maggam embroidery on back
Need one worker for shifting boxes and shop cleaning for one day
Two workers needed for plastering material movement and site cleanup
New kanjeevaram saree, need fall and edges

chatThreads.lastMessage: The embroidery is almost done. Will send photos soon!

messages.text: Hi Lakshmi ji, I wanted to check on my blouse progress
Hello! Yes, it's going great. The cutting is done and I've started on the embroidery.
The embroidery is almost done. Will send photos soon!

chatThreads.lastMessage: I'll bring the new tap connector. See you tomorrow.

messages.text: Hi, is 2 PM tomorrow still good?
Yes, perfect. I'll bring the new tap connector. See you tomorrow.

chatThreads.lastMessage: Your clothes are packed and ready for delivery by 6 PM.

messages.text: Can you pick up the laundry before noon?
Yes, pickup is scheduled between 11 and 11:30 AM.
Your clothes are packed and ready for delivery by 6 PM.

chatThreads.lastMessage: I will bring the ladder, tester, and new screws.

messages.text: The ceiling fan is already delivered. Do I need to arrange anything else?
No, I will bring the ladder, tester, and new screws.

chatThreads.lastMessage: Two cleaners will arrive with machine scrubber and supplies.

messages.text: Please focus on kitchen shelves and both bathrooms.
Noted. We will cover kitchen shelves, chimney exterior, tiles, taps, and floor stains.
Two cleaners will arrive with machine scrubber and supplies.

chatThreads.lastMessage: Cooling test will take about 20 minutes after cleaning.

messages.text: The AC is cooling slowly. Can you check the gas also?
Yes, we will clean filters, check coil condition, and test gas pressure.
Cooling test will take about 20 minutes after cleaning.

chatThreads.lastMessage: I can stay till 6 PM if the shifting takes longer.

messages.text: Need help moving boxes from ground floor to second floor.
Okay. Please keep the boxes taped and marked if anything is fragile.
I can stay till 6 PM if the shifting takes longer.

chatThreads.lastMessage: I will share two shade options after checking the wall.

messages.text: The living room wall has damp patches near the window.
We should inspect before painting. Waterproof primer may be needed.
I will share two shade options after checking the wall.

chatThreads.lastMessage: Please keep the machine empty before the visit.

messages.text: The washing machine stops after filling water.
It may be a sensor or drain issue. I will inspect both.
Please keep the machine empty before the visit.

chatThreads.lastMessage: Keep kitchen shelves empty for best treatment coverage.

messages.text: I need pest control mainly for kitchen and utility area.
We will use gel treatment for cabinets and spray for corners.
Keep kitchen shelves empty for best treatment coverage.
